title: verbascum trapifolium var. trapifolium
intro: Verbascum trapifolium var. trapifolium, also known as the biennial mullein, is a variety of the mullein plant that has a biennial growth habit. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Verbascum trapifolium var. trapifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of health issues.
